creator: alexbestms@wwu.de
text:
in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/doc/mailing-lists/archive/1997/ all archives for all mailinglists dated 19970101 contain trailing garbage.

How-To-Repeat: `fetch ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/doc/mailing-lists/archive/1997/freebsd-current/19970101.freebsd-current.gz && gunzip 19970101.freebsd-current.gz`

shows: gunzip: 19970101.freebsd-current.gz: trailing garbage ignored

this can be repeated for all mailinglists.
